bead.title: runs list: combined /nodes/:nodeId/runs + project /runs pages with URL-backed filters
bead.description:
Build the run history list pages.

1. /nodes/:nodeId/runs (combined, all projects)
   - Shows run records from all registered projects
   - Each row: project badge, layer badge (work/try/run), status, beadId (linked), startedAt, durationMs
   - Filter chips: layer, status
   - Rows link to /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/runs/:runId

2. /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/runs (project-scoped)
   - Same layout but scoped to one project
   - Filter chips: layer, status, harness; time range picker
   - URL encodes active filters: ?layer=try&status=success&harness=claude
   - Reload restores filters exactly
   - NavShell shows Runs tab in project nav

Both pages use Relay pagination with load-more.

Depends on ddx-37a24699 (runs backend).
bead.acceptance:
1. /nodes/:nodeId/runs renders cross-project run list with project and layer badges.
2. /nodes/:nodeId/projects/:projectId/runs renders project-scoped list with filter chips.
3. Filter chip selection updates URL and filters list; reload restores same view.
4. Combined view: row click navigates to correct project-scoped detail URL (carries projectId).
5. Empty state shown when no runs match filters (not a blank page).
6. NavShell Runs tab highlights when on either runs route.
